tech_news.title: SHIFT UP acquires Shinji Mikami-led studio UNBOUND - Gematsu
tech_news.description: SHIFT UP has fully acquired UNBOUND, the new Tokyo-based game studio founded by Resident Evil creator and Devil May Cry producer Shinji Mikami in November 2022, the company announced.

tech_news.title: Google Readies Screenless Fitbit Band to Rival Growing Whoop Craze - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is developing its own fitness band, aiming to compete with screenless wearable devices from upstarts like Whoop Inc. and Oura Health Oy.

tech_news.description: Apple Silicon Macs get a performance boost thanks to better unified memory usage.

tech_news.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale - The Verge
tech_news.description: Amazon’s Big Spring sale is almost over, but you can still save on power banks, cables, and a host of great charging accessories from Anker, Baseus, Ugreen, and more.

tech_news.title: Samsung’s new app claims to alleviate motion sickness using sound - The Verge
tech_news.description: ﻿Listening to a 100Hz sine wave tone for just 60 seconds could reduce motion sickness symptoms for up to two hours.
